name: testRememberMeUncheckedDontSaveUserEmail
description: User email is NOT remembered after first successful login with unchecked 'Remember me'
descriptionHtml: User email is NOT remembered after first successful login with unchecked 'Remember me'

testStage.description: User email is NOT remembered after first successful login with unchecked 'Remember me'

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Verify: The user's email is not in the email field
